prompt:
A photorealistic 1:1 lifestyle photograph: a glowing-skin woman in her late 20s standing at a sunlit modern kitchen counter, smiling softly as she lifts ONE dark sugar-dusted sea moss gummy CUBE from her hand toward her parted lips, mid-bite frozen. She wears soft cream-and-oat athleisure, hair loosely tied back, minimal makeup, natural beauty. On the counter next to her, clearly visible: the JAR from the provided reference image — a black plastic jar with bold teal/cyan and yellow accents, the front label reading 'DIALED SEA MOSS Gummies, TASTY · CONVENIENT · EFFECTIVE, 60 GUMMIES, DIETARY SUPPLEMENT', and a side panel reading 'MsB° Mineral Support Blend' in a vertical teal strip. The jar lid is off and a few additional dark sugar-dusted gummy CUBES (matching the gummies in the reference photo) sit on a small ceramic dish beside the jar. The jar must be a faithful match of the reference image — same shape, same label artwork, same proportions, fully legible.

Kitchen background: minimalist scandi-modern, white oak shelves with linen-stoneware mugs and a small potted herb, white-marble counter, a window in the background washing the scene in soft golden morning light. Shallow depth of field, gentle bokeh on the background, crisp focus on the woman's hand-to-mouth area and the gummy + jar.

Lighting: warm natural morning sunlight from the right side, soft rim-light catching her cheek and the rim of the jar, gentle film-grade color grade (warm highlights, soft shadows). Editorial wellness-brand campaign feel — Hims/Athletic Greens/Goop quality, NOT stock-photo cheesy.

Framing: square 1:1, three-quarter portrait composition — woman from mid-chest up, hand+gummy held in the upper-third of the frame near her face, jar visible in the lower-third on the counter. Both subject and product clearly recognizable.

Style: hyper-realistic photography, 35mm look, f/2.0 shallow depth, natural skin texture, no AI artifacts, no extra fingers, gummy clearly held between thumb and index finger.
